title: Minecraft 3D
description:
Texture pack that adds several detailed 3D block models to Minecraft.

This texture pack uses default textures from Minecraft but adds a 3rd dimension.

Preserves the classic look of Minecraft, and enhances it.

Additional Content Soon
body:
Dive into a fresh take on your Minecraft world, with my 3D default texture pack Pack! This pack builds upon the classic default textures you know and love, but with a stunning twist, all block models have been transformed into detailed 3D models. The pack changes the basic minecraft blocks to give the game true 3D detail in basic blocks while keeping the original textures and being very Vanilla friendly.

The pack is frugal with additional polygons making it perform well on even basic hardware. In a typical Gpu accelerated system you should only experience 1-2 fps reduction due to this pack. This may be impacted by many factors including the Minecraft version, the hardware, the drivers or the installed texture pack version. Keep this in mind but so far I have not heard of any major performance degradation from anyone testing it.

The following blocks have changed in this release:

- Grass block
- All planks
- bricks
- Iron block
- All variations of pressure plates
- Crafting table

  
The blocks in the pipeline (not yet released):

- All vraiations of slabs
- All variations of logs
- Stone block

![In game screen shot of grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/469bfeed1f49df93b1613a9371e51894b76840d5.jpeg)
